role_title: Senior Associate, Marketplace - Restaurant Growth Strategy & Operations

location.office_time_required: unclear — hybrid model balancing in-person collaboration with remote work

level_signals: 3+ years of experience in a problem-solving role
Owns visible goals driving top-line and bottom-line performance

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 3+ years of experience in a problem-solving role (consulting, tech, banking).
You have an extreme sense of ownership — you never shy away from tackling ambiguous problems and can motivate teammates to go above and beyond.
You solve problems from first principles and resist "this is how it's always been done" thinking.
You thrive with a diverse set of responsibilities and love working across teams and disciplines.
You're an analytical powerhouse — you let data win arguments and are comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and modeling in Excel.
You're a collaborator with experience managing stakeholders across diverse audiences, from front-line doers to senior executives.

scope.surface: US Marketplace Strategy & Operations — Restaurant Growth (selection, merchandising, merchant partnerships, product commercialization)
primary_metrics_inferred: Top-line and bottom-line performance of core marketplace
core_responsibilities: Own visible goals that drive both top-line and bottom-line performance of core marketplace business
Launch new restaurant selection onto the marketplace
Commercialize products that help restaurant partners grow their businesses on DoorDash
Identify and execute the most promising ways to grow marketplace revenue
Deepen DoorDash's partnership with restaurant partners
Bring new products and strategies to market, integrating new value propositions into the restaurant ecosystem

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed ($87K–$128K national base)
Comprehensive benefits package including 401(k) match, 16 weeks parental leave, wellness benefits
Clear ownership of visible, high-impact business goals
Cross-functional exposure to Product, Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Sales
red_flags: No specific cities listed for hybrid office requirement — unclear which offices are involved and how often in-person is expected
Visa sponsorship not addressed anywhere in the JD
Pay range is wide ($87K–$128K) and noted as localized — actual offer may vary significantly by location
Nice-to-haves section is entirely absent — hard to know what differentiates candidates

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, years requirement, and comp range)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from mention of 'Remote Jobs Associated With Office in NYC' notice and hybrid model language)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'Base salary is localized according to an employee's work location')
ambiguities: Location cities not specified for the role itself — the NYC AEDT notice suggests NYC is one possible location but the JD body does not name specific office cities for this role
Hybrid split (days per week/month in office) is not defined — only described as 'balancing in-person collaboration with remote work'
